title: Constitution
description: Core values, creative principles, engineering principles, voice, and definitions.

title: Cosmology
description: Looking Glass, Canon, Atelier, Nursery, the Triad, and the Living Companions — how the universe fits together.

title: Canon
description: The living collection of truths discovered through building.

title: Visual Canon
description: The approved visual language — imagery, references, and illustration rules.

title: Symbolarium
description: The symbols and what each one means. Symbols are a language, not decoration.

title: Living Companions
description: The pack — true stories of the companions, told properly or not at all.

title: Engineering
description: Technical architecture, standards, and specifications of the Canon itself.

title: Design System
description: Color tokens, typography, spacing, accessibility, and print.

title: Chronicles
description: The record of what happened, and when.

title: Looking Glass
description: Experiments and ideas not yet Canon.

title: Atelier
description: Works in progress — the making place.

title: Root System
description: Books, entries, assets, relationships, and version control — the structure beneath everything.
